zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Carew於1401年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾卡維時，她的父親Thomas Carew34歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Bonville39歲。她於大約1415年與Sir Thomas Tremayne在英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年在英國英格蘭多瑟特布利波特享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Carew于1401年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾卡維时，她的父亲Thomas Carew34岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Bonville39岁。她于大约1415年与Sir Thomas Tremayne在英国英格兰戴文拉梅頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年在英国英格兰多瑟特布利波特享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Carew was born in 1401, in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Carew, was 34 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Bonville, was 39. She married Sir Thomas Tremayne about 1415, in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1456, in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United King: Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Carew est née en 1401, à Carew, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Carew, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Bonville, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Tremayne environ 1415, à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1456, à Bridport, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Carew 1401 in Carew, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Carew 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Bonville 39. Sie hat um 1415 in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Tremayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1456 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bridport, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas Tremayne circa 1415, nel Lamerton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Carewが1401年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアカーエウで生まれた時，父Thomas Carewは34歳，母Lady Elizabeth Bonvilleは39歳であった。約1415年にイギリスイギリスデボンラムルトンでSir Thomas Tremayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリドプオルトで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Carew(이)가 1401년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 카레에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Carew(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Bonville(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 램르턴에서 Sir Thomas Tremayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브리드포트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Carew nasceu em 1401, em Carew, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Carew, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Bonville, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Tremayne aproximadamente 1415, em Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Carew родилась в 1401 г. в местности карю, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Carew было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Bonville, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Tremayne около 1415 г. в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1456 г. в местности бридпорт, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Tremayne aproximadamente 1415, en Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1456, en Bridport, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
